creator: admin@support.od.ua
text:
The daemon code for Linux includes:

#ifdef linux
    const int one = 1;
    setsockopt(m_Socket.native_handle(), IPPROTO_TCP, TCP_QUICKACK, &one, sizeof(one));
#endif

You need to explicitly disable this option in the system:

cat << EOF >> /etc/sysctl.conf
### for i2pd
net.inet.tcp.delayed_ack=0

EOF
